samples.xml_description:
Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding. 8-bit input operand A (multiplicand). 8-bit input operand B (multiplier). 16-bit output for the product. shifts[3:0] Counter to track the number of shifts. Temporary storage for the product.

Initialize the shifts and product_temp registers to 0.

Use a for loop to iterate through each bit of the multiplier (B).

For each bit of the multiplier, add the multiplicand (A) to the product_temp register if the multiplier bit is 1.

Shift the multiplicand (A) left by one bit using a logical shift.

Increment the shifts register by one.

After the for loop, assign the product_temp register to the product output.

Reset the shifts and product_temp registers to 0 for the next operation.
